fields.title: Sandbox service: replace Effect.runFork in callback with proper Effect bridging
fields.description: services/sandbox.ts uses Effect.runFork(SubscriptionRef.set(state, decoded)) inside a pi.events.on callback and Schema.decodeUnknownSync in a try/catch. Should use Schema.is or decode idiomatically.
fields.close_reason: Replaced try/catch + Schema.decodeUnknownSync + Effect.runFork with Schema.is type guard + Effect.runSync. Cleaner, no unnecessary fiber creation, no silent catch.
